children.text:
Set up text alerts to
switch to Wi-Fi
content-desc: Set up text alerts to switch to Wi-Fi

children.text: *Cancel within 30 days or you will be auto-billed $4.99/mo. (for 1 line) or $9.99/mo. (up to 10 lines). Cancel anytime. Data rates & restr's apply. New subscribers only.
content-desc: Cancel within 30 days or you will be auto-billed $4.99 per month for one line or $9.99 per month for up to 10 lines. Cancel anytime. Data rates and restrictions apply. New subscribers only.

children.text: See plan details below
AT&T Smart Limits Important Disclaimers
30 Day Offer

New AT&T Smart Limits subscriber receives 1st 30 days free. 30 day offer avail. only when billed by AT&T. Unless cancelled, after 30 days will be auto-billed $4.99/mo. for 1 line or $9.99/mo. up to 10 lines.

Cancel anytime. View, modify or cancel your subscription at www.att.com/mobilepurchases or call 1-800-331-0500.
content-desc:
New AT&T Smart Limits subscriber receives first 30 days free. 30 day offer available only when billed by AT&T
 Unless cancelled, after 30 days will be auto-billed $4.99 per month for one line or $9.99 per month for up to 10 lines. Cancel anytime. View, modify or cancel your subscription at www.att.com/mobilepurchases or call 1-800-331-0500.

children.text: AT&T Smart Limits
Compatible phone w/elig. data plan req'd. Data & messaging rates may apply for app download & usage. Feature and functionality varies by mobile operating system.
content-desc: Compatible phone with eligible data plan required. Data and messaging rates may apply for app download and usage. Feature and functionality varies by mobile operating system.

children.text: Block Cellular Data does not block Wi-Fi usage.
Wi-Fi® Reminders do not limit data usage and do not prevent overages.

Time Restrictions on data use are not guaranteed to be precise and do not work for restricting data usage while the user is on Wi-Fi. Incoming calls are allowed at all times, including during time restrictions, except from numbers designated as Blocked Numbers.
Purchase Limits does not restrict credit card purchases from smartphone app stores.
Text Limits applies to SMS only. Text Limits does not include picture or video messaging, or third-party messaging services.

Blocked Numbers blocks 10-digit U.S. phone numbers with valid area codes and calls to 411. It may not block other 10-digit numbers like international numbers. Blocked Numbers does not block picture or video messaging, or third-party messaging services (such as iMessages® and WhatsApp®).
content-desc:
Blocked Numbers blocks 10-digit U.S. phone numbers with valid area codes and calls to 4 1 1
 It may not block other 10-digit numbers like international numbers. Blocked Numbers does not block picture or video messaging, or third-party messaging services such as i messages and What's App.

children.text: General

Technical, network and other service limitations may apply. Coverage not available everywhere. Not all features accessible through app. Other charges & restrictions may apply. Intended for U.S. service only. App may use personal info. This use is governed by AT&T's Privacy Policy found at att.com/privacy.
For additional terms and conditions, go to
att.com/wirelesssmartlimitsterms.
content-desc: ATT dot com slash wireless smart limits terms

children.text:
When bedtime means bedtime,
AT&T Smart Limits lets you manage
your kids' phone use
